admin.click_below_to_change: Click the button below to change the corresponding setting.
admin.no_auctions_in_db: No auctions in the database yet 📭

bid.welcome:
Hi! I am an auction bot. You can bid in the channel.

Commands:
/my - My active auctions
/won - My won auctions
bid.no_my_active: You haven't participated in any active auctions yet.
bid.no_won: You haven't won any auctions yet.
bid.bid_exists_alert: Bid of {{price}} {{cur}} already exists! Try making a bid of {{expectedPrice}} {{cur}}
bid.outbid_notify: 🔔 Your bid in auction "{{title}}" was outbid! New price: {{price}} {{cur}}
